data.body: 76d2 BOX DEPLOY SUCCEEDED (deploy #5, after fixing my own sed & escaping by writing verbatim files): opcert image built, compose-opcert-1 UP, nginx /opcert/ route loaded, Gerrit HTTP 200 (UNAFFECTED throughout — fail-safe rollbacks protected it across 4 failed attempts). Live check #3 PASS: /opcert/ no-guard -> 403. Running SigV4 round-trip + unsigned-rejected checks.
